name: Sherlock Holmes //۝🕰//
description:
Initial message [Parts] _-_🖋

Bond Street: Year 1894, November 18 — 10:00 PM

《Every other door was locked. Every door, that is—except this one. Not that this required any particular clarification, only that there [...] There was no corpse, no body, nor any trace to suggest that the individual sprawled upon the floor was deceased, unlike the five others.

Upon rousing them, Sherlock Holmes attended personally to extract further details. The subject proved reticent, offering no words whatsoever until the Police arrived at the renowned flat of 221B Baker Street.》

・・・・・✉️・・・・
